A.name: Group1 李盈萱
A.theme: Theme description: A single-page website that showcases 15 quick plant-based recipes (each within 15 minutes) designed for students. The site promotes low-carbon, sustainable eating by encouraging reduced meat consumption and lower environmental impact, helping users make climate-friendly food choices in everyday life.

A.name: Group2 葉柔辰、陳宇緹、卓少筠
A.theme: AeroGreen: A Platform for Sustainable Aviation and Eco-Friendly Travel AeroGreen is a comprehensive web platform dedicated to promoting sustainable practices within the aviation industry. Our website features an interactive Personal Carbon Footprint Calculator that allows travelers to estimate their flight emissions and rewards them with Eco-Miles for making greener choices, such as selecting vegetarian in-flight meals. Additionally, AeroGreen provides a B2B enterprise portal with a backend dashboard, enabling airlines and corporate partners to efficiently monitor sustainability metrics and track their carbon offset progress. By combining gamification for individual users with practical tools for enterprises, AeroGreen aims to drive real climate action and encourage eco-conscious travel decisions.

A.name: Group3 蘇晏婷、陳思宇、梁瑋文
A.theme: Theme description: This website is an educational platform dedicated to promoting awareness and understanding of the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). It provides comprehensive information on all 17 SDGs, including their background, objectives, key challenges, and practical actions that individuals can take to contribute to sustainable development. To enhance user engagement and learning effectiveness, the website integrates visual design, bilingual support, and interactive scenario-based activities. Users can explore each SDG in detail, analyze real-world sustainability issues, and participate in decision-making exercises that encourage critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Through these interactive experiences, the platform helps users understand the social, economic, and environmental dimensions of sustainable development and their interconnections. The primary goal of this website is to serve as an accessible learning resource for students and the general public, fostering sustainability literacy and encouraging users to transform sustainable concepts into meaningful actions in their daily lives. By promoting knowledge sharing and public participation, the platform aims to contribute to the achievement of a more sustainable and inclusive future.

A.name: Group4 姚喬嫚、陳少畇
A.theme: Theme description: Empowering Local Economies and Cultural Heritage through Web Innovation

A.name: Group5 黃丞胤
A.theme: Theme description: EMOCEAN, "The Ocean of Emotions", is an interactive web sanctuary designed for stress relief. It allows users to anonymously cast their thoughts into a digital ocean. The platform visualizes these collective emotions through dynamic waves, word clouds, and soothing music, providing an immersive therapeutic experience.

A.name: Group6 陳俊岳、蔡仁懋、賴韋衡
A.theme: Theme description: A brief description of your webpage's topic and content We are a passionate group of travel advocates dedicated to protecting Green Island through low-carbon, sustainable tourism. Our platform seamlessly covers every step of your journey—from the latest eco-news and transportation tips to our interactive Green Map, local eco-conscious merchants, and rewarding travel missions. Join us in connecting with conscious locals, discovering the island’s hidden beauty, and making your travels a powerful force for ecological conservation.

A.name: Group7 吳若喬、陳佑瑄、沈湘淇
A.theme: Theme description: This website explores SDG 01: No Poverty through interactive experiences and data visualization. Users can simulate life in different countries through role-playing games, discover global poverty distribution via an interactive world map, and dive into Taiwan's local poverty statistics through dynamic charts. By combining gameplay, real data, and policy insights, the site transforms a complex global issue into an accessible and engaging learning journey.

A.name: Group8 周怡辰、黃銘翰、柯翔崑
A.theme: Theme description: Highlight accessible facilities. Provide locating, reporting features and more.

A.name: Group9 Rémy QUENY
A.theme: Theme description: Justice World is a multi-page static website dedicated to UN Sustainable Development Goal 16 — Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions. It presents real international data on corruption, homicide rates, and the rule of law through an interactive world map, dynamic charts, and 180 individual country profile pages, allowing users to explore and compare governance quality across the globe.

A.name: Group10 張翔安、伍育嫻
A.theme: Theme description: Ncu Uber ride sharing platform for NCU students, aiming to reduce carbon emissions and promote sustainable transportation on campus

A.name: Group11 黃士桓、陳昱翔
A.theme: EqualPay is a data center that visualizes gender and age-based salary gaps through government statistics, making salary inequality immediately apparent. The platform aims to promote salary transparency and fairness, responding to SDG 10 (reducing inequality), and helping society better understand and improve salary disparities.

A.name: Group12 李承懋
A.theme: Theme description: Eco Sorting Challenge is an interactive web game designed to promote environmental awareness by gamifying garbage classification. It helps users learn waste management rules through an engaging drag-and-drop experience. By incorporating time pressure and real-time feedback, the game makes the learning process more effective, accessible, and practical for daily life.

A.name: Group13 田詠竣
A.theme: Theme description: Random Color Generator is an interactive web application designed to help users explore and understand color theory. By generating random colors and providing detailed information about their RGB, HEX, and HSL values, the website offers an engaging way to learn about color combinations, contrasts, and harmonies. Users can also save their favorite colors and create custom palettes for design projects.

A.name: Group14 莊鎧鴻
A.theme: Protocol 13 is an interactive climate-action website that tackles the biggest barrier to climate awareness: the feeling that the crisis is distant and abstract. Instead of showing global statistics, it makes climate change personal. Users enter their own city and instantly see its projected future — how many more extreme-heat days it will face by 2050, how much average temperatures will rise, and which coastal areas will be lost to sea-level rise. These projections are computed in real time from the Open-Meteo climate API (based on CMIP6 models), and the flood maps are drawn from Climate Central's peer-reviewed sea-level model, so the data is genuine rather than illustrative. The site then turns concern into agency through a net-zero simulator, where users adjust real climate-policy levers and watch the projected warming respond — discovering for themselves that no single action is enough and that meaningful change requires combined effort. The goal is a complete emotional arc: from "this feels far away," to "this is about my home," to "here is what I can do."

A.name: Group15 鄭志緬
A.theme: Theme description: The website serves as a wellness hub that helps users develop healthy daily habits and improve their overall well-being. It provides health-related resources, exercise planning tools, daily health tracking features, first aid information, and local health resources. Users can monitor important wellness indicators such as sleep, water intake, exercise duration, and mood. The website also offers educational content and practical guidance to encourage healthier lifestyles and raise awareness about the importance of physical and mental health. The goal is to promote positive health behaviors and support individuals in maintaining a balanced and healthy life.

A.name: Group16 陳慧美、王若琳、楊依純
A.theme: Theme description: reflecting the theme of food, soil, and harvest.we also have our logo and we make it a animated floating logo and also put some circle designs at the background.This website was created to educate people about climate change and environmental sustainability. It helps users understand environmental issues, raises awareness of their impacts, and encourages everyone to take small actions to protect the planet.

A.name: Group17 王宇崴
A.theme: This website allows users to learn more about SDGs12(reduce plastic waste) and can also use practical operation to know your carbon footprint.

A.name: Group18 廖可筠、劉千、沈昕慧
A.theme: MindBreath Hub is an SDG 3-aligned, cross-platform mental health website designed for college students. It replaces monotonous forms with a unified 3-in-1 Master Quiz that evaluates Academic, Lifestyle, and Social stressors using diverse mechanics: 5-point Likert scales, percentage track sliders, and situational checkbox matrices. Upon completion, a custom algorithm calculates a holistic Stress Intensity Ratio, dynamically displays adaptive emotional icons, and instantly matches users with personalized coping strategies and direct links to campus counseling networks and national 24/7 crisis hotlines.

A.name: Group19 施竑宇、彭靖淵、張循
A.theme: Theme description: Campus Nature Explorer is an interactive website that introduces wildlife and plant species found on the National Central University campus. Through species guides, interactive maps, and educational activities, users can learn about biodiversity, sustainability, and ecosystem conservation.

A.name: Group20 吳絃竑、李庭宇、商逢育
A.theme: Theme description: Interactive Visualization of Taiwan's Marine Fishery Catch

A.name: Group21 曾培宸、詹迪凱
A.theme: Designed around the core values of Sustainability Campus Connection and Smart Sharing this website provides NCU students and faculty with an intuitive eco-friendly bike-sharing platform

A.name: Group22 賴昱豪、林益誠、曾丰翊
A.theme: Theme description: Using 24 hours a day as the main theme, this website covers nine major themes including commuting, dining, and consumption, transforming abstract carbon emissions into stories of everyday life choices. Users can make real-time selections and calculate their carbon footprint instantly. The platform emphasizes interactive experiences and real-life scenario connections, turning sustainability issues from slogans into tangible experiences. It covers themes such as commuting, dining, energy, and consumption.

A.name: Group23 呂怡柔、楊心妤
A.theme: Theme description: This web application is a dedicated platform promoting sustainable fashion and clothing circularity, with a primary alignment on SDG 12 (ResponsibleConsumption and Production). By facilitating the transparent and accessible sharing, exchanging, and donating of pre-owned garments and footwear, the platform extends the lifecycle of textiles and addresses the root causes of over consumption and waste.In addition to its core focus, the platform integrates multiple UN Sustainable Development Goals to amplify its social and environmental impact

A.name: Group24 胡亞嫙、張藝齡、賴柔羽
A.theme: Theme description: EcoLife Simulator is an educational game website about sustainability and the Sustainable Development Goals. Users make choices in different life scenarios, and their decisions affect scores related to environmental, social, developmental, and global issues. Through interactive gameplay, visual feedback, different endings, and a leaderboard, the website helps users understand how everyday actions can contribute to a more sustainable future.

A.name: Group25 呂沛珍
A.theme: Theme description: This website, titled "GREEN OR NOT," is dedicated to unmasking the phenomenon of "greenwashing", a deceptive marketing practice where companies falsely claim to be environmentally friendly. Through interactive diagnostics and in-depth case studies across fast fashion, fossil fuels, and ESG investing, the platform aims to bridge the information asymmetry between corporations and consumers. It provides practical check tools, regulatory insights, and public tracking resources to empower users to see through misleading green filters and make truly sustainable choices.

A.name: Group26 林昱辰、許姵暄、江羽倢
A.theme: This website is an interactive English learning website designed to make learning English engaging, personalized, and fun. The functions includes quizzes, flashcards, news recommendations, meme collections and learning analytics. (There are more detailed features in each functions.)

A.name: Group27 黃梓祐、林秉毅
A.theme: This website is designed to help users relax muscles and correct workout posture. It provides guidance on proper exercise form to improve performance and prevent injuries.

A.name: Group28 張學睿、鄧竣宸、陳品丞
A.theme: Theme description: AssetWise is an interactive web application designed to digitalize and optimize the management of public campus equipment. Moving away from traditional, inefficient paper-based tracking, our platform establishes a synchronized data pipeline using Google Apps Script (GAS) to monitor asset allocation, quantity, and expiration statuses in real time. A core innovation of AssetWise is its built-in "Second-hand Valuation Calculator". By integrating mathematical depreciation algorithms based on equipment conditions and annual depreciation rates, the system dynamically calculates the remaining market value of assets. This dual approach ensures effective inventory management, minimizes the premature disposal of school supplies, and actively promotes asset circulation and reuse within the campus ecosystem.

A.name: Group29 張宜靜
A.theme: Theme description: Peace, justice, and a sound judiciary confront forgetting, transforming anger into reason

B.name: Group1 吳安柔
B.theme: Theme description: "Mes amis, les animeux" (My Friends, the Animals) is a community platform celebrating the bond between humans and the animal world. The site offers two complementary sections: Animal World — in-depth articles on species biology, habitats, and conservation; and Animals Through Our Eyes — personal stories of everyday wildlife encounters. Visitors can register, publish articles with photos and nature sounds, like and bookmark posts, leave comments, and explore stories pinned on an interactive 3D globe. The platform aims to spark curiosity about biodiversity and inspire a gentler coexistence between people and nature.

B.name: Group2 蘇郁茜
B.theme: Theme description: This website focuses on the core concept that "employee health is a sustainable asset for enterprises," integrating annual health check-up data, health benefits, anonymous corporate statistics, and AI health recommendations into an interactive ESG health management platform.

B.name: Group3 陳青嫻、蔡芳媛、黃子芹
B.theme: Theme description:Our website's main goal is to introduce everyone Taiwan's Mini 100 Peaks, and encourage people to visit the mountains themselves. Through the main page on the website, we can find the list of mountains and their introductions. In "My Space" page, this is where we can make our own records and diaries of the mountains we climbed. We also designed level and badge systems, so the users can gain more sense of achivement during the journey of exploring the mountains in Taiwan.

B.name: Group4 蔡瑞陽、郭家睿
B.theme: Theme description: Student IDs: Our website is a second-hand marketplace for NCU students. It allows students to buy and sell used items on campus, helping reduce waste and promote reuse.

B.name: Group5 邱鈺婷、林昀希
B.theme: Theme description: Student IDs: 113403034, 113403534

B.name: Group6 楊晴文、陳宥澄、廖璟呈
B.theme: Theme description: This webpage is an interactive educational platform dedicated to SDG 11 (Sustainable Cities and Communities). It aims to bridge global sustainability frameworks with local practices by analyzing key targets, examining international success stories (such as Copenhagen and Singapore), and highlighting localized urban governance cases in Taiwan (including Taipei, Kaohsiung, and Tainan). Through data visualization and interactive tools like the "City Sustainability Planner," the platform provides students, researchers, and citizens with an intuitive and accessible way to explore how modern cities can achieve inclusivity, resilience, and sustainable development.

B.name: Group7 蕭筠蓁、蘇于涵、余妍萱
B.theme: Theme description: Student IDs: 113403035, 112403042, 113403527

B.name: Group8 陳玟茹
B.theme: Theme description: This website explores how artificial intelligence can unintentionally reinforce gender inequality. Through real-world case studies, interactive flip cards, an AI image experiment, and a knowledge quiz, users learn about the root causes of AI gender bias, its impact on society, and concrete pathways toward fairer AI systems.

B.name: Group9 池翊寧
B.theme:
Theme description:The Pac-Map project is a creative game that focuses on the United Nations SDG 11, which is about making cities safe, strong, and sustainable. The game uses real city maps to help players learn about disaster safety, public spaces, and local history. By playing this game, people can easily understand how important it is to have good city planning and safe places to go when a sudden emergency happens.
 The main feature of this project is that it turns real-world street maps into a giant game maze. It takes real map data and makes a digital copy of the city that you can interact with. Players can play the game smoothly on a computer using a keyboard, or on a mobile phone using a touch screen. The game also puts real locations on the map, like actual convenience stores, train stations, and famous historical sites. This makes the game world feel very real and familiar.
 To play the game, players move their character through the street maze to collect dots and get a high score. But they also have to run away from ghosts that chase them along the roads. If a player loses health, they can walk to a real-life store on the map to get items and heal. Also, players must stay inside a safe zone that keeps getting smaller over time. This shrinking zone acts like a real disaster warning, teaching players how to quickly find a safe path to escape. If a player needs a safe place to hide, they can go to a historical monument. There, they can read real facts about the history and stay completely safe from the ghosts for a short time.

B.name: Group10 謝怡婕
B.theme: Theme description: An interactive web platform designed to promote healthy daily habits, aiming to make health management engaging and actionable.

B.name: Group11 戴睿真、蕭彤恩、欉家誼
B.theme: Theme description: Our website focuses on SDG 4: Quality Education and raises awareness of global educational inequality. Through interactive content, regional comparisons, educational statistics, quizzes, and voting activities, users can explore the challenges faced by different communities and learn how education can create a more equitable and sustainable future.

B.name: Group12 陳辰
B.theme: Theme description: This is a premium, fully responsive web application designed to promote and popularize the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) through gamification, interactive artificial intelligence, and real-time news integration.

B.name: Group13 陳衡毅、劉亮廷、張恩愷
B.theme: Theme description:Food & Mind Journal is an AI-powered platform that combines food safety education and mental well-being support. Users can explore food safety knowledge, analyze food labels, interact with an AI assistant, and assess their emotional condition, helping them make healthier and more informed daily decisions.

B.name: Group14 張茗崴、張子衡、蔡博宇
B.theme:
Theme description: Heirloom Select is a sustainable e-commerce platform, inspired by UN SDG 12 — Responsible Consumption and Production.
 The platform offers a curated selection of eco-friendly products , all made from recycled, reclaimed, or biodegradable materials.
 Heirloom promotes conscious consumption, encouraging users to choose durable, planet-friendly products over disposable ones — guided by its tagline: "Designed to disappear, built to last."

B.name: Group15 黃品皓
B.theme: Theme description: This website focuses on SDG 14: Life Below Water and aims to raise public awareness of marine conservation and sustainable development. The website introduces marine biodiversity, environmental challenges such as plastic pollution and overfishing, and practical solutions for protecting ocean ecosystems. Interactive activities, educational content, and sustainable seafood information are included to help users understand the importance of preserving marine resources for future generations.

B.name: Group16 熊浥辰、鍾主悅
B.theme:
Theme description: This website, titled "Climate Ascent" (登峰危機), is an interactive platform focused on climate change awareness. It challenges users to "climb" through the impacts of global environmental crises.
 The site features an exploration map of global extreme weather hotspots and outlines survival rules for climate disasters game. It also highlights critical environmental data, such as rising global temperatures and the impacts of historical events like Hurricane DANA, the Black Summer Wildfires, and South Asian floods, engaging users through gamified mechanics and leaderboards.

B.name: Group17 潘芊涵、王文岑、羅妍安
B.theme: Theme description: "Grain of Hope" is an interactive web platform developed to support SDG 2: Zero Hunger.The website combines data visualization, artificial intelligence, and educational activities to help users understand the relationship between global hunger and food waste. Through features such as an AI recipe generator, an interactive hunger map, a food waste calculator, educational quizzes, and an online pledge system, the platform encourages users to reduce food waste and contribute to sustainable development.

B.name: Group18 段景旻、陳帝通
B.theme: Theme description: Light Pollution Map

B.name: Group19 何沛姍
B.theme: Theme description:"Dive into Dilemma" is an immersive, interactive personality quiz themed around a 1,000-meter submarine descent from Taiwan's coast to the Mariana Trench. It challenges users to navigate complex real-world environmental trade-offs between green technology and marine conservation. The web page features dynamic audio filtering based on depth, a cascading causal feedback system that visibly degrades the ocean environment upon choosing development, and a final 4-quadrant personality matrix with actionable SDG guides.

B.name: Group20 黃妍瑄、松怡琳、薛閔云
B.theme: Theme description:"OceanProtection" is a website about saving our oceans and changing our habits. Through these fun and interactive features, we want to teach people about plastic pollution and inspire everyone to reduce waste.

B.name: Group21 陳政煒、施駿朋
B.theme: Theme description:Our website focuses on introducing various types of renewable energy and nuclear power. Through an animated interactive map, users can explore different energy sources in a more visual and engaging way. We also turn complex scientific principles into clear animations and present large amounts of energy data through easy-to-read charts. In addition, our website includes interactive quizzes that allow users to test their knowledge and learn interesting energy facts. We also provide relevant news articles to help users stay updated on the latest developments in renewable energy.

B.name: Group22 朱家締、羅乃慈、祝善煦
B.theme: Theme description: EcoPulse is an interactive platform dedicated to promoting UN Sustainable Development Goal 12, focusing on responsible consumption and production. By combining engaging educational content with personalized lifestyle assessments, the website helps users understand their environmental impact and provides actionable solutions to bridge the gap between awareness and sustainable daily habits.

B.name: Group23 吳品儁、李加恩
B.theme: Theme description: "Fisher's Echo" is an educational platform dedicated to marine conservation and SDG 14. Its core features include a fisherman's perspective that highlights the ocean crisis through a fisherman's eyes, showing realities like declining fish populations, plastic waste, and livelihood uncertainties; a call to action that empowers visitors with practical weekly tasks, like reducing single-use plastics and supporting sustainable seafood; and interactive content that engages users with a "Fisherman's Story," an interactive "Net Casting Experience," and the latest marine conservation news. Designed to inspire, it combines storytelling and actionable steps to protect our oceans.

B.name: Group24 鄭旭宸、王仲毅
B.theme:
Theme description:"Echoes of the Deep" is an immersive full-stack scroll-telling web application dedicated to raising awareness for SDG 14: Life Below Water. Stepping into a first-person submarine cockpit view, users embark on a cinematic deep-sea dive driven by the Lenis smooth scrolling engine and GSAP animations.
 As users descend, a custom JavaScript audio engine dynamically shifts the soundtrack：lowering the pitch, slowing the pace, and muffling the ambient ocean sounds to simulate intense deep-sea water pressure. Along the voyage, users can directly click on various marine creatures to trigger their real vocalizations and unlock hologram encyclopedias, while confronting critical ecological crises across different depth zones (sunlight, twilight, and midnight zones).
 Upon reaching the ocean floor, users initiate an analytical terminal that seamlessly communicates with a remote Python Flask backend and SQLite database to sync and render real-time global leaderboard statistics, turning passive environmental education into an unforgettable interactive odyssey.

B.name: Group25 Pushti Mer、Karthik
B.theme: Theme description: SkillQuest is a browser-based educational platform that provides free courses on practical skills such as financial literacy, cybersecurity, AI, career readiness, and entrepreneurship. The website combines learning with gamification through quizzes, certificates, points, and monetary rewards to make education more engaging and accessible.

B.name: Group26 郭明儒
B.theme: Theme description: Our website is an interactive 3D carbon footprint awareness game. Users can control a character in a 3D scene, interact with the carbon footprint calculator, enter daily activities such as food consumption, transportation, electricity usage, and daily disposable items. The system calculates the total carbon emissions and converts them into the number of trees needed to absorb the emissions. Users can then drag and plant saplings in the 3D environment. The website also includes a history dashboard to record and display recent carbon emission trends.

B.name: Group27 黃靈顥、謝承諺、張靖賦
B.theme: Theme description: This website is a Taiwan water resource and pollution monitoring platform. It monitors important rivers and reservoirs in Taiwan, displays river pollution levels, provides water quality data, and allows citizens to report abnormal water conditions such as wastewater discharge, garbage accumulation, or fish deaths. The goal is to support environmental protection through real-time monitoring and public participation.

B.name: Group28 李後均、柯羿
B.theme: Theme description: PomoGrowth is an interactive web application that combines the Pomodoro time-management technique with gamification to enhance productivity and mental wellness. The platform features customizable focus and break intervals (such as 25/5 or 50/10 minutes), a built-in ambient soundscape player offering Lofi and nature sounds, and a dynamic pixel-art virtual pet that reacts to the user's current timer state. By rewarding users with experience points (XP) and level-ups for completing deep-work sessions, it transforms standard time management into an engaging, rewarding experience.

B.name: Group29 林于翔
B.theme: Theme description: The overarching theme of this webpage is centered around Sustainable Development Goal 16 (SDG 16), which focuses on promoting peaceful and inclusive societies, ensuring equal access to justice for all, and building effective, accountable, and transparent institutions at all levels.

B.name: Group30 李思妤、陳音儒
B.theme: Theme description: Health+ is a health-support website designed to help users understand their physical and mental well-being. It provides tools such as BMI and TDEE calculators, health quizzes, a daily lifestyle and mood tracker, nearby exercise place recommendations, and an AI-based “tree hole” mailbox for emotional support. The website aims to encourage users to care for both their body and emotions through simple, interactive, and practical health-related functions.

B.name: Group31 張恩嘉
B.theme: Theme description: Student ID: 113403536
